name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 28 Jul 2025
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we are introducing big advancements to how you sign in and manage your account security, brought in by the following two new exciting features:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Identity Portal","bold":true},{"text":": Centralized location for managing the user profile information and account security options"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Passkeys","bold":true},{"text":": A secure sign-in option that does not require you to enter login credentials or authentication One-Time Passwords (OTPs)."}]}]}]},{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"Note","bold":true},{"text":": You must have a Maropost Identity account to avail these feature benefits. If you are still using the legacy Neto login, see the "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/discussion/3268/feature-launch-maropost-identity-for-neto","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"launch announcement"}]},{"text":" for migration instructions."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"New Features"}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Identity Portal for Managing Profile and Security Options"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Extending the benefits of unified SSO of Maropost Identity, you now have access to the Identity portal – a centralized location for Maropost users where you can manage your profile information and account security options."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can access the portal directly at "},{"forceBasicLink":true,"type":"a","url":"https://id.maropost.com/","embedData":{"body":"","url":"https://id.maropost.com/","embedType":"link","name":"Maropost Identity","faviconUrl":"https://id.maropost.com/images/android-icon-192x192.webp"},"children":[{"text":"https://id.maropost.com/"}]},{"text":" or from your Neto control panel by clicking your username at the top-right corner, and selecting "},{"text":"Manage account and password","bold":true},{"text":". "}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/C1OCVMVVYC81/accessingportal.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/C1OCVMVVYC81/accessingportal.png","name":"AccessingPortal.png","type":"image/png","size":137277,"width":1054,"height":1062,"displaySize":"medium","float":"none","mediaID":380,"dateInserted":"2025-07-29T20:50:45+00:00","insertUserID":5460,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"5460","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"On the portal, you can do the following:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Profile tab","bold":true},{"text":": Update your user profile information, such as your first and last name, company name, and phone number."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Security tab","bold":true},{"text":": Update your password, reconfigure your Multi-factor Authentication setup, and manage your passkeys. "}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1421-maropost-identity-login-and-account-management-in-neto","children":[{"text":"Maropost Identity – Login and Account Management in Neto."}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/2AED14TWEFRZ/identity-profile.jpg","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/2AED14TWEFRZ/identity-profile.jpg","name":"Identity-Profile.jpg","type":"image/jpeg","size":263113,"width":2560,"height":1192,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":382,"dateInserted":"2025-07-29T20:54:05+00:00","insertUserID":5460,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"5460","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Passkeys as Sign-In Option"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Neto has introduced an additional sign-in method that uses passkeys instead of the traditional username and password. Using a passkey is a secure login option that does not require you to enter login credentials or authentication One-Time Passwords (OTPs)."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"What is a passkey?","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"A passkey is an encrypted credential used for authenticating account login requests without the need for a username, password, or OTP, thus providing users with the convenience, all while ensuring a high degree of security. Here, users typically approve the sign-in process in the same way they unlock their devices, using biometrics, facial/fingerprint recognition, PIN, or pattern."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Setting up a passkey","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Neto enables you to create multiple passkeys, which is useful if you have multiple accounts or devices. You can set up and manage the passkeys on the "},{"text":"Security","bold":true},{"text":" tab of the "},{"type":"a","url":"https://id.maropost.com/","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Identity portal"}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about passkeys, including how to set them up and how to use them to log in, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2260-passkeys-for-neto-login-on-windows","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Passkeys for Neto Login on Windows"}]},{"text":" and "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2261-passkeys-for-neto-login-on-macos","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Passkeys for Neto Login on macOS"}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"Note","bold":true},{"text":": The passkey options can vary depending on your device operating system. Some passkey options require you to enable them on the device before set up."}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/YN6W4BLVRT99/identity-passkey.jpg","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/YN6W4BLVRT99/identity-passkey.jpg","name":"Identity-Passkey.jpg","type":"image/jpeg","size":902691,"width":2560,"height":2688,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":381,"dateInserted":"2025-07-29T20:53:25+00:00","insertUserID":5460,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"5460","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
